panel.title: IOC Feed Browser
panel.description: Browse and filter IOCs by type

search.query:
| inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_domain | eval ioc_type="domain" | append [| inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_url | eval ioc_type="url"] | append [| inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_ip | eval ioc_type="ip"]
| eval selected_types="$ioc_types$" | eval selected_types_mv=split(selected_types, "|") | eval show_record = if("$ioc_types$" != "" AND mvfind(selected_types_mv, ioc_type) >= 0, 1, 0) | where show_record == 1
| eval search_match = if( "$ioc_search$"=="" OR match(ioc_value, ".*" + "$ioc_search$" + ".*") OR match(indicator_id, ".*" + "$ioc_search$" + ".*") OR match(tags, ".*" + "$ioc_search$" + ".*") OR match(anyrun_task_url, ".*" + "$ioc_search$" + ".*"), 1, 0) | where search_match == 1
| table ioc_value, ioc_type, created, modified, confidence, tags, anyrun_task_url, indicator_id | sort -modified
| rename ioc_value as "IOC Value" | rename ioc_type as "IOC Type" | rename created as "Created" | rename modified as "Modified" | rename confidence as "Confidence" | rename tags as "Tags" | rename anyrun_task_url as "Task URL" | rename indicator_id as "Indicator ID"

panel.title: IOC types distribution
panel.description: Distribution of IOC types over time

search.query: | inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_domain | eval ioc_type="domain" | append [| inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_url | eval ioc_type="url"] | append [| inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_ip | eval ioc_type="ip"] | stats count by ioc_type

| inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_domain | eval ioc_type="domain" | append [| inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_url | eval ioc_type="url"] | append [| inputlookup anyrun_feed_ioc_ip | eval ioc_type="ip"] | stats count by ioc_type
